name: Avocado Toast
description: Whole grain toast topped with mashed avocado, cherry tomatoes, and a sprinkle of chia seeds.

name: Grilled Chicken Salad
description: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens, cucumbers, and a balsamic vinaigrette dressing.

name: Quinoa and Veggie Stir-fry
description: Stir-fried quinoa with a variety of vegetables like bell peppers, broccoli, and carrots.

name: Chia Pudding with Berries
description: Chia seeds soaked overnight in almond milk, topped with fresh berries.

name: Greek Yogurt with Honey and Walnuts
description: Creamy Greek yogurt topped with honey and crunchy walnuts.

name: Salmon with Steamed Asparagus
description: Grilled salmon fillet served with steamed asparagus and a lemon wedge.

name: Sweet Potato and Black Bean Tacos
description: Soft corn tortillas filled with roasted sweet potato and seasoned black beans.

name: Oatmeal with Almond Butter and Banana
description: Whole oats cooked with almond butter and topped with sliced banana.

name: Spinach and Lentil Soup
description: A hearty soup made with spinach, lentils, and spices, packed with iron.

name: Grilled Steak with Roasted Vegetables
description: A juicy grilled steak served with roasted potatoes and green beans, rich in iron.

name: Tofu Stir-fry with Bok Choy
description: Stir-fried tofu with bok choy and a savory soy-based sauce, full of plant-based iron.

name: Chickpea and Quinoa Salad
description: A refreshing salad with chickpeas, quinoa, and greens, offering a great source of iron.

name: Salmon with Steamed Kale
description: Grilled salmon served with steamed kale, a meal rich in both iron and omega-3s.

name: Iron-Rich Smoothie
description: A smoothie made with spinach, banana, and fortified plant milk, packed with iron.
